rationale: Gov't Code §2003.101 governs procedures for contested tax hearings before administrative law judges. It contains no provisions regarding homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no conflict arises.
quote: The office shall conduct hearings relating to contested cases involving the collection, receipt, administration, and enforcement of taxes, fees, and other amounts as prescribed by Section 111.00455, Tax Code.
_note: Rule text is procedural only; no substantive overlap with the proposed homestead exemption increase.
